summary: Fixes Inbox layout so Gmail stays within the detail pane like Chat and Calendar.

fixed: Inbox uses the same layout as Chat and Calendar — account tabs plus a clipped web view below the chrome bar
Gmail no longer expands to fill the entire window after loading; the web view respects the detail pane bounds
Embedded web view containers ignore Gmail's intrinsic content size so SwiftUI layout stays stable
Removed the extra Inbox header caption that added height above the account tabs
